explanation: Inserted quotes around the binary path and the database path to demonstrate safe mutation via insertion. The command remains functionally identical.
Removed quotes from the command line to test if the rule detects the command without them. The command is still valid and functionally identical.
Used double quotes around both the binary and database path to test if the rule accounts for quoted paths. This is a safe mutation technique for testing detection robustness.
Reordered the command line by using a shorter path representation (no quotes) to test if the rule is sensitive to such variations. The command remains functionally identical.
Applied mixed quoting (no quotes on the binary, quotes on the database path) to test if the rule is sensitive to such variations. The command remains functionally identical.
